resumeText:
```html

Candidate

Candidate | +91-0000000000 | candidate@example.com

PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY

Aspiring Frontend Developer with 0-1 years of experience in full-stack development, proficient in JavaScript, React, Node.js, and MongoDB. Profound understanding of MERN stack and full-stack web development. Proficient in HTML, CSS, and TypeScript. Strong team collaboration and code review skills. Proficient in GitHub and willing to work on generative AI projects.

EDUCATION

B.Sc, Computer Science, ,

TECHNICAL SKILLS

  • Languages: JavaScript, Python, TypeScript
  • Frontend: React, HTML, CSS
  • Express.js, Node.js
  • Tools: MongoDB, GitHub

EXPERIENCE

MERN Full Stack Developer, Not Confirmed, Not Confirmed

  • Collaborated with teams to develop and deploy full-stack web applications.
  • Participated in code reviews and ensured clean code quality.
  • Developed and tested full-stack applications using MERN stack.
  • Deployed applications on production environments.
  • Developed and deployed React applications with efficient UI/UX.
  • Collaborated with teams to design and implement full-stack solutions.
  • Participated in code reviews and ensured adherence to coding standards.
  • Developed and deployed Node.js applications with efficient backend logic.
  • Collaborated with teams to ensure timely project delivery.

PROJECTS

```
reason: PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY word count outside 80-110. Some bullets missed the 10-22 word target.
